key_changes: Added WatchPaths array with {cards} placeholder for event-driven triggering
Maintains ProgramArguments, StandardOutPath, and logging configuration

patterns_discovered.description: Migration from KeepAlive=true (continuous process) to WatchPaths (filesystem event trigger)
patterns_discovered.alignment: Matches project architecture directive: 'dispatcher (WatchPaths event, no polling)'

patterns_discovered.description: Removed 6 lines of deprecated config (KeepAlive + RunAtLoad) and added 5 lines of new WatchPaths config
patterns_discovered.significance: Surgical change with minimal diff surface area

patterns_discovered.description: Uses {cards} variable substitution in template string for path configuration
patterns_discovered.risk: Variable must be defined by caller; undefined variable would create invalid plist

gotchas_discovered.description: The {cards} placeholder must be correctly populated at runtime; if undefined or malformed, the plist will have invalid path and WatchPaths will not trigger
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify caller provides valid {cards} path before plist generation

gotchas_discovered.description: Changed from 'always running + restart on crash' to 'triggered on filesystem events'; dispatcher must handle initial state before any watch events occur
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Test initial card processing when launchd service first starts

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: No explicit error handling for missing WatchPaths target
gotchas_discovered.description: launchd will silently fail to monitor non-existent paths; no validation in plist generation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add runtime validation that {cards} directory exists before invoking dispatcher

approach_outcome.objective_met: Replaced persistent background process model with event-driven WatchPaths model
approach_outcome.architectural_alignment: Enables dispatcher to react to card filesystem changes rather than continuous polling
approach_outcome.code_quality: Clean, minimal diff; aligns with project memory stating 'WatchPaths event, no polling'
approach_outcome.testing_signal: Successful commit indicates at least basic validation passed

recommendations.rationale: Template variable must resolve to valid directory path for WatchPaths to function

recommendations.action: Test WatchPaths event triggering in integration tests
recommendations.rationale: New event-driven model has different behavior than keep-alive; needs explicit validation

recommendations.action: Document the launchd behavior change in code comments
recommendations.rationale: Future maintainers should understand why KeepAlive was removed and what WatchPaths enables

recommendations.action: Validate that {cards} path exists before plist deployment
recommendations.rationale: Silent launchd failures on missing WatchPaths targets; runtime check prevents deployment issues
Event-driven should reduce CPU/memory vs. persistent keep-alive; verify in production
